requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — 220 V / 50 Hz / Type C & E Plug (CODINORM / IEC)
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——220V / 50Hz / C型与E型插头（CODINORM / IEC）
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——220V / 50Hz / C型與E型插頭（CODINORM / IEC）

summary.en: Ivory Coast operates on 220 V / 50 Hz mains supply. Standard plugs are Type C (Europlug, two round pins) and Type E (French-style, two round pins with earth socket in wall), identical to the French system inherited from colonial-era infrastructure. Wireless and IoT devices with mains power supplies must comply with IEC 62368-1 (audio/video, IT, and communications equipment safety) or IEC 60950-1 (legacy) as referenced by CODINORM CI standards. Products designed for Chinese 220 V / 50 Hz mains may be electrically compatible, but plug type (Chinese GB 2099 Type I differs from Type C/E) and French-language safety labelling must be addressed. Test reports to IEC standards from an accredited laboratory are required for the ARTCI homologation dossier.
summary.zh: 科特迪瓦使用220V / 50Hz市电供应。标准插头为C型（欧洲插头，两圆脚）和E型（法式，两圆脚带壁式接地插座），与沿用自殖民时期基础设施的法国电制相同。使用市电电源的无线及物联网设备须符合CODINORM CI标准参考的IEC 62368-1（音视频、信息技术及通信设备安全）或IEC 60950-1（旧版）标准。为中国220V / 50Hz市电设计的产品在电气上可能兼容，但需解决插头类型（中国GB 2099 I型插头与C/E型不同）和法语安全标注问题。ARTCI同质化申请文件须附有经认可实验室出具的IEC标准测试报告。
summary.zht: 科特迪瓦使用220V / 50Hz市電供應。標準插頭為C型（歐洲插頭，兩圓腳）和E型（法式，兩圓腳帶壁式接地插座），與沿用自殖民時期基礎設施的法國電制相同。使用市電電源的無線及物聯網裝置須符合CODINORM CI標準參考的IEC 62368-1（音視頻、資訊技術及通訊設備安全）或IEC 60950-1（舊版）標準。為中國220V / 50Hz市電設計的產品在電氣上可能兼容，但需解決插頭類型（中國GB 2099 I型插頭與C/E型不同）和法語安全標注問題。ARTCI同質化申請文件須附有經認可實驗室出具的IEC標準測試報告。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62368-1 (audio/video, IT and communications equipment — safety, via CODINORM)
IEC 60950-1 (IT equipment safety, legacy, via CODINORM)
CEI/IEC plug standards — Type C (CEE 7/16) and Type E (CEE 7/5)
220 V / 50 Hz mains specification (Ivory Coast national grid)

summary.en: Chinese devices are certified to GB 4943.1 (IT equipment electrical safety, equivalent to IEC 60950-1) or GB/T 20600 (IEC 62368-1 aligned) via CCC (China Compulsory Certification). Mains voltage is 220 V / 50 Hz — same as Ivory Coast — so voltage compatibility is generally not an issue. However, Chinese plugs are Type I (GB 2099.1, two or three flat pins at an angle) which are not compatible with Ivory Coast Type C/E sockets. Safety labelling is in Chinese rather than French.
summary.zh: 中国设备通过CCC（中国强制认证）取得GB 4943.1（信息技术设备电气安全，等同IEC 60950-1）或GB/T 20600（与IEC 62368-1接轨）认证。市电电压为220V / 50Hz，与科特迪瓦相同，因此电压兼容性通常不成问题。但中国插头为I型（GB 2099.1，两脚或三脚斜插），与科特迪瓦C/E型插座不兼容。安全标注为中文而非法文。
summary.zht: 中國設備通過CCC（中國強制認證）取得GB 4943.1（資訊技術設備電氣安全，等同IEC 60950-1）或GB/T 20600（與IEC 62368-1接軌）認證。市電電壓為220V / 50Hz，與科特迪瓦相同，因此電壓兼容性通常不成問題。但中國插頭為I型（GB 2099.1，兩腳或三腳斜插），與科特迪瓦C/E型插座不兼容。安全標注為中文而非法文。

standards_or_laws: GB 2099.1 / GB 1002 (Chinese plug/socket standard — Type I)

gap.en: Partial gap: mains voltage (220 V / 50 Hz) is identical so no electrical conversion is needed. Key gaps are: (1) plug type — Chinese Type I plug must be changed to Type C/E for the Ivorian market; (2) safety labelling must be in French; (3) IEC 62368-1 test reports to CODINORM CI standards from an ARTCI-accepted laboratory are required; Chinese CCC / GB 4943.1 certificates alone are not accepted by ARTCI.
gap.zh: 部分差距：市电电压（220V / 50Hz）相同，无需电气转换。主要差距在于：（1）插头类型——须将中国I型插头改为科特迪瓦市场使用的C/E型；（2）安全标注须使用法语；（3）需提供来自ARTCI认可实验室的符合CODINORM CI标准的IEC 62368-1测试报告；仅凭中国CCC / GB 4943.1证书不被ARTCI接受。
gap.zht: 部分差距：市電電壓（220V / 50Hz）相同，無需電氣轉換。主要差距在於：（1）插頭類型——須將中國I型插頭改為科特迪瓦市場使用的C/E型；（2）安全標注須使用法語；（3）需提供來自ARTCI認可實驗室的符合CODINORM CI標準的IEC 62368-1測試報告；僅憑中國CCC / GB 4943.1證書不被ARTCI接受。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese CCC / GB 4943.1 electrical safety certificates are not accepted by ARTCI. The product plug must be adapted to Type C/E; safety documentation must be in French; and IEC 62368-1 test reports to CODINORM CI standards from an ARTCI-accepted laboratory are required.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国CCC / GB 4943.1电气安全证书不被ARTCI接受。产品插头须适配C/E型；安全文件须使用法语；并需提供来自ARTCI认可实验室的符合CODINORM CI标准的IEC 62368-1测试报告。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國CCC / GB 4943.1電氣安全證書不被ARTCI接受。產品插頭須適配C/E型；安全文件須使用法語；並需提供來自ARTCI認可實驗室的符合CODINORM CI標準的IEC 62368-1測試報告。
